MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO-TTX AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, FREDDY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
